violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer, and temporary dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Water observed in stacked plastic food containers. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in a kitchen drawer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: food prep sink kitchen carts mixer slicer utensil drawers grill table beneath grill table beneath steamer oven refrigerators freezer shelf beneath cook's prep table. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025

The floors have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, especially along walls and around equipment legs. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
One ceiling light cover is in poor repair (cracked). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The window ledge above the dishwasher table and 3 bay sink has an accumulation of soil residue, leaves, and debris. The electrical box and conduit next to the tilt skillet has an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
One light beneath the hood, and one ceiling light panel were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025
Ceiling tiles an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies in kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. PIC stated they have been ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The floors especially beneath the dishwasher have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The window ledge above the dishwasher is in poor repair, with a front trim piece broken off. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024
Ceiling tile above the dishwasher is in poor repair, with the surface material torn. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The kitchen will need an additional hand sink. The left side of the kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, mixing bowl) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bright pink biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies in kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. DeBug pest control service monthly, last date of service 11/22/2024, New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Utensils are stored in unclean drawers, with food contact surfaces in contact with unclean items. Dough hood observed stored on same hook as keys. Clean equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean location, where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area down the hall. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The plastic top of the robot coupe was not in good repair, with parts broken off. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: table beneath grill storage drawers including drawer handles portable fan inside of freezer lower shelves throughout kitchen New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, especially beneath the dishwasher area, and beneath milk crates used as dunnage racks. The window ledge along the wall with the 3 bay sink and dishwasher has an accumulation of debris, cobwebs, and dead insects.The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The kitchen will need an additional hands ink. The left side of the kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The kitchen will need an additional handsink. The left side of the kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (juice syrups) in the 3 door reach in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Salad in small ramekins being served for lunch was observed held at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Salads were recently prepared and were for immediate consumption. Salads were deemed safe for consumption. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Various foods were observed held at 44-54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed by the PIC. See attached disposal for additional temperature observations. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. Additional refrigeration required. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The food processor lid was not in good repair. Equipment was taken out of service during time of inspection. Food processor not to be used until lid is replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
Walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair, ambient temperature unable to hold TCS/PHF. Walk-in cooler was out of service prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of ice machine were observed with an accumulation of pink residue. The non-food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
The windowsill juncture in the dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
Ceiling tile in the dishwasher area is in poor repair (minor moisture damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the 3 door each in and in the dry pantry area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
